name: P_element_hotspot_chrX_singed_locus
description: Drosophila TE insertion hotspot: P-element hotspot near the singed (sn) cytological band — historical singed-weak mutation derives from P insertion. Drosophila genomes carry ~15-20% TE content. Insertion hotspots reflect both target-site preference and lower selection in low-recombination regions. Reads hitting these regions are typically misplaced unless full-length insertion-specific anchors are available.
expected_copy_count: 10-100 copies of the named TE family genome-wide; locally enriched 3-10x baseline
